overview: Board-certified urology practice specializing in men's hormone health, sexual function, and reproductive medicine. Offers personalized treatment protocols including testosterone therapy, erectile dysfunction treatment, male fertility assessment, and microsurgical interventions.
highlights: Microsurgical expertise in varicocelectomy and spermatic cord denervation
Comprehensive hormone assessment and personalized treatment plans
targetAudience: Men seeking specialized care for low testosterone, sexual health concerns, fertility issues, and reproductive health.
